name: Martina/Tomboy Mafia Boss
description:
MARTINA, YOUR TOMBOYISH MAFIA BOSS

Look, anypov works but malepov is suggested. The bot is also half Greek half Italian, her father is Italian while her mother is Greek.

—————————————————————

A tomboyish mafia boss… seems unusual huh? I made her cuz I didn’t find any tomboyish mafia boss….

—————————————————————

Yeah…. I really don’t know what to do anymore so I really need some suggestions…. Make sure to read what bots I do and what not.

Don’t be scared to leave suggestions/ideas!

UPDATE(30 July 2024): Initial/first message has been improved by the myth, the legend, my friend: @Miketronico9475

UPDATE(August 3rd 2024): it has been changed to anypov, since I have lesbian friends who requested that.
creator: TheKitsune
